attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

codes_manifest.display: prednisolone (candidate — AMT code provisional, verify against NCTS)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-RHEUM-01-00246 — SEQ derived from source CDV-046 (046); ingest --reseq will assign the real globally-unique sequence within the SPEC-RHEUM-01 bucket.

Specialty inferred as RHEUM (giant cell arteritis is a large-vessel vasculitis managed by rheumatology/ophthalmology); VASC and OPHTHAL added as secondary tags. Source note was filed under the Cardiovascular (CVD) case set — specialty_tags are authoritative and revisable at review with no cost to the seal.
Sex at birth NOT stated in the source note — inferred female (weak epidemiological prior; GCA is ~2–3x more common in women). Please confirm on clinician review.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is a physically-present clinician who palpated the temporal artery, performed a formal eye examination, and administered oral prednisolone on-site. These clinician-only findings and interventions were sealed into 10/11 (physical_sign / investigation_result + telehealth_limits); the AI-appropriate action was reprojected to recognise suspected GCA + arrange urgent same-day in-person assessment for treatment + hard visual-symptom escalation.

Tier set to T3 (urgent same-day in-person assessment) because there is currently NO visual involvement; T4 (same-day ED) recorded as an acceptable alternative and a fallback edge (ESC-004). Any new visual/neurological symptom escalates to T5 (ESC-001/ESC-003). Under-triage to a benign-headache/routine pathway is flagged as the critical failure mode.

dose_route_frequency for prednisolone (60 mg PO once daily) taken directly from the source encounter; gastroprotection, bone protection and low-dose aspirin recorded WITHOUT invented doses (to be set at in-person prescribing).
SNOMED/ICD-10-AM/AMT codes are candidates only, unverified pending terminology receipt; the AMT prednisolone code in particular is provisional and must be verified against NCTS.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
